properties.name: CROSSROADS Maldives
properties.description:
ITS NOT A RESORT…A WORLD-CLASS DESTINATION
Just 15 minutes from Velana International Airport and Malé, CROSSROADS Maldives invites you to go beyond the typical “one-island, one-resort” experience and enter a fully integrated lifestyle destination. With three resorts, a 30-berth quay, the legendary Hard Rock Cafe, diverse retail and dining, thrilling excursions and blissful spa offerings, this is where memories are made.
AN INSPIRING HISTORY
Developed by S Hotels and Resorts Public Company Limited and Singha Estate Public Company Limited, CROSSROADS is a destination for modern world voyagers. Inspired by the Maldives’ maritime history as a waypoint at the centre of the world, CROSSROADS was designed in the spirit of an island village where travellers can rest, recharge and reconnect. From its architecture and design to the way its features blend with nature, CROSSROADS echoes the past while bringing visitors into an exciting future.
360 DEGREES OF HAPPENINGS
Going beyond the traditional “one-island, one resort” concept that typifies the region, Crossroads Maldives offers a new integrated experience. The multi-island lifestyle destination includes two resorts – the vibrant SAii Lagoon Maldives, Curio Collection by Hilton and the iconic Hard Rock Hotel.
properties.short_description: ITS NOT A RESORT…A WORLD-CLASS DESTINATION

accommodations.title: UNFORGETTABLE GETAWAYS
accommodations.description:
UNFORGETTABLE GETAWAYS
In a multi-resort paradise, you can take your pick of three world-class resorts, each with its own character and flair. Choose your perfect holiday haven, settle in and live it up at a fully integrated destination where everything is connected.

accommodations.title: Saii Lagoon Maldives
accommodations.description:
Settle into your boho chic tropical retreat, surrounded by the azure waters of the Indian Ocean. With dreamy rooms and villas just steps from the sand, barefoot relaxation awaits.
Starting from rate $250

accommodations.title: Hard Rock Hotel Maldives
accommodations.description:
Kick back with the whole crew in an iconic destination designed for music-lovers and pleasure-seekers. With non-stop fun, the memories you make are like a melody you can’t shake.
Starting from rate $320

dining.title: INTERNATIONALLY INSPIRED DINING
dining.description: For centuries, traders and explorers brought their recipes to The Maldives, blending their delectable delights with the irresistible local cuisine. At CROSSROADS, that exquisite collision of culinary cultures is reflected in a smorgasbord of delicious dining destinations.

dining.title: Hard Rock Cafe
dining.description:
Located at The Marina @ CROSSROADS, this is a taste that needs no introduction. The iconic rock-inspired beach front restaurant offers a slice of life on the red carpet in the Maldives. Complete with legendary music memorabilia, signature cocktails, and a full menu of fresh, handmade American classics, including the Legendary® Burger, savoury sides and delicious salads. Our expert chefs use only the freshest ingredients to prepare culinary greatness on every plate.
12:00 PM - Midnight
Closed on Tuesdays

dining.title: The Beach Club
dining.description:
Located at SAii Lagoon Maldives, SAii Beach Club offers the ultimate leisure experience with an infinity pool with ocean views, a gelato counter, a private access beach, premium casual restaurants, a boutique shop, specialty bars and poolside dining. This sun-dappled spot promises chic vibes and chilled, yet playful atmosphere with an upbeat soundtrack and a multi-cuisine menu designed by our culinary experts. Drift barefoot by the sea, enjoying relaxed cuisine complemented by the fresh salt air.
Miss Olive Oyl Restaurant A playful eatery that takes its inspiration from the fresh familiar flavours of the Mediterranean with a distinct dining space.
11:00 AM - Midnight
Open Daily

dining.title: Nihonbashi Blue
dining.description:
Nihonbashi Blue is casual by the sea Japanese restaurant by Sri Lanka’s Nihonbashi Restaurant (Asia’s 50 Best Restaurants 2013-2018) founder Dharshan Munidasa. Emulating its Colombo branch, with its sake bar, sushi counter with dedicated sushi chefs, Nihonbashi Blue also houses Maldives’s first Tatami seating area for families and larger gatherings to enjoy a more true Japanese experience.
Lunch: 02:00PM - 05:30PM
Dinner: 05:30PM - 11:00PM
Closed on Wednesday

dining.title: Ministry of Crab
dining.description:
One of Asia’s 50 Best Restaurants in Sri Lanka, unsurpassed in its celebration of the legendary Sri Lankan Mud Crab. These world famous crabs are flown in twice a week, with the smallest size being 500 grams, right up to the mammoth 2kg Crabzilla! A haven for crustacean fans, Ministry of Crab Maldives also offers up a selection of Freshwater Prawns, Oysters and Clams from Sri Lanka.
Lunch: 12:00 PM - 03:00 PM
Dinner: 05:30 PM - 11:00 PM
Open Daily

dining.title: Jiao Wu
dining.description:
Delight in exquisite Cantonese cuisine combined with sumptuous nutritious seafood soups; Jiao Wu is inspired by the culture of food for health. Savour the rich and authentic flavours set in a theatrical show kitchen. Make your choice with half of the restaurant dedicated to rich, spicy hot-pot tables, and half to al a carte Chinese-style fare.
Lunch: 12:30 PM - 03:00 PM
Dinner: 06:30 PM - 10:30 PM
Closed on Sunday

dining.title: Kinkao - Thai Bistro
dining.description:
Experience traditional Thai cuisine served with a creative modern twist. At Kinkao we showcase the very best of Thailand’s varied culinary cultures using only the freshest and most delicious ingredients. Abundant choice defines the full-service menu for an exquisite, casual and comfortable dining experience.
Lunch: 12:30 PM - 03:00 PM
Dinner: 06:30 PM - 10:30 PM
Closed on Wednesdays

dining.title: Kebab & Kurry
dining.description:
The colours and vibrancy of Indian cuisine are an essential part of your Indian Ocean experience, and this chic and casual grill has among its offerings the famous Tandoori Kebab. Succulent and bursting with flavour, it perfectly complements the full, traditional curry menu.
Lunch: 12:30 PM - 03:00 PM
Dinner: 06:30 PM - 10:30 PM
Closed on Mondays

dining.title: Carne Diem Grill by Dharshan
dining.description:
A unique grill oven created by Chef Dharshan Munidasa, firing at 750 Celsius, creates the Best Steak Ever, using Westholme Australian Wagyu Steak.
Lunch: 12:00 PM - 03:00 PM
Dinner: 05:30 PM - 11:00 PM

dining.title: Kalhu Odi
dining.description:
From folklore passed down through generations in the islands of the Maldives, is the tale of Dhon-Hiyala and Alifulhu. The star-crossed lovers that fought desperately to be with each other, never to be thwarted by the jealousy and envy of the king.
Afternoon Tea 04:30 PM - 05:30 PM
Dinner 06:00 PM - 10:30 PM
Open Daily

properties.name: Cocoon Maldives
properties.description:
Crystal clear water, beautiful sunsets and relax. Where contemporary taste is blended with the beauty of the Indian Ocean, beaches and tropical weather, creating a unique resort, the very first design hotel in Maldives. LAGO design furnishing combines naturally with the Maldivian ambience, creating a welcoming and hospitable environment for an unforgettable holiday. The resort is located in the Lhaviyani Atoll, a scenic 30-minute seaplane journey from Malé, Velana International Airport.

60 Overwater Villas & Suites | 90 Beach Villas & Suites | 3 Restaurants | 2 Bars | Spa

dining.title: Dinning Experience
dining.description:
With a selection of three restaurants and two bars, you will be spoilt for choice. The resort offers Restaurant with Buffet Meals, Coffee Shop and Beach Bars.
​The main Restaurant, OCTOPUS, serves themed buffet with interactive live stations. For those seeking a romantic dinner by candlelight to the rising lovers’ moon, MANTA Restaurant offers à la carte dining in the lagoon. JAPANESE GARDEN is dedicated to authentic Japanese flavors with a breathtaking view of the Indian Ocean. KURUM-BAR is a laid-back space for sunset drinks, while the LOABI LOABI pool Bar is a convivial meeting place hosting parties every evening.

dining.title: Octopus Restaurant
dining.description:
Showcasing culinary highlights from around the world the Resort Buffet Restaurant, the OCTOPUS serves Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner. Enjoy weekly themed nights such as Asian and Sushi Night, Maldivian Night, Italian Night, Mediterranean Night, Indian Night, Moroccan Night which transform the atmosphere of the Octopus restaurant into a great dining experience.
​Breakfast: 0730hrs- 1000hrs Lunch:1230hrs- 1430hrs Dinner:1930hrs- 2130hrs

dining.title: Loabi Loabi Bar
dining.description:
The Resort main bar, the LOABI LOABI is available throughout the day for all our customers and offers refreshing beverages along with Maldivian cocktails. Cocoon’s pool-side bar and a convivial meeting spot, Loabi Loabi Bar hosts weekly entertainments such as DJ, Live Music, Latino Night, White Party, Maldivian Night and Karoke to keep you engaged and grooving all night!
Opening hours: 10:00-00:00hrs

dining.title: Manta Restaurant
dining.description:

dining.title: Kurum - Bar
dining.description:

We cook fresh fish from our lagoon and offer a variety of tasty brunch options that will satisfy your taste buds.
​Opening hours: 1000hrs -1830hrs

properties.name: Joy Island Maldives
properties.description:
Joy Island, a name could never be more fitting for a joyful place.
An island of happiness, full of activities and services for the most fun holiday in Maldives.
Featuring 151 villas on the beach and in the lagoon, Joy Island is located in North Malé Atoll close from Velana International Airport, only 40 minutes away by speedboat. The shape of this beautiful island resembles a butterfly with its wide white sand beach, surrounded by a stunning turquoise lagoon.
From spacious villas to elegantly luxurious suites, 60 rooms located overwater with breathtaking views of the Indian Ocean, and 91 rooms on the beach surrounded by beautiful tropical vegetation; each accommodation is thoughtfully designed to ensure your utmost comfort. Savor the added luxury of private plunge pools for an intimate for an intimate experience for a refreshing dip.
Dining at Joy Island is a culinary experience with selection of 3 restaurants and 1 bar to choose from, The Market, Palm Beach, Il Basilico and Rainbow Bar.
Joy Island is celebrating 1 year anniversary with fireworks, artists and fun activities. Join us in this celebration.
properties.short_description: Joy Island, a name could never be more fitting for a joyful place.

accommodations.title: Beach Villa
accommodations.description:
Our entry level room, 50-square meters Beach Villas of Joy Island are located on the east side of the
island with an amazing sunrise view. Each villa includes a typical open air Maldivian bathroom for an
authentic experience.

accommodations.description:
Beach Suites at 70-square meters, offers more space with larger living rooms and bathrooms. They are
located on the opposite side of the island with respect to Beach Villas, promising a stunning sunset view.
Each Beach Suite includes a typical open air Maldivian bathroom.

accommodations.title: Family Beach Villa
accommodations.description: Joy’s huge 100-square meters Family Beach Villas are the perfect option for families of three or more with an inter-connecting door from the veranda. They are ideal for parents who wants to stay close to their children but also want their own privacy.

accommodations.title: Lagoon Suite
accommodations.description: Joy Island’s 70-square meters Lagoon Suites provide direct access to the turquoise lagoon, and guests enjoy stunning views over the ocean, complete with outrageous evening sunsets. From every point in the room guests are treated to views that maintain a constant visual relationship with the landscape.

accommodations.title: Lagoon Suite Pool
accommodations.description: Joy Island’s 100-square meters Lagoon suite pool are a step-up in extravagant luxury, these suites come with a wade-in private pool on the sundeck. Ideal for couples who wants to enjoy a romantic escape in an amazing landscape.

accommodations.title: Beach Residence
accommodations.description: Joy Island’s 300-square meters Beach Residence is the ultimate in lux comfort, and is the largest guest suite on the island. It has 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms and a magnificent living room. It also presents an outdoor dining area, with a private plunge pool. Its stunning beachfront setting affords a jaw dropping view of the lagoon and of the sunset.

accommodations.title: Lagoon Residence
accommodations.description: Our largest overwater suite, 280-square meters; this luxurious villa features modern furniture with colours that complements the amazing landscape. This corner of heaven is ideal for submerging in a special retreat, far from the busy life. It has a big private deck with sunbeds, a gorgeous lagoon setting with a private pool and sunset view. The suite offers everything you could want for an exclusive, romantic and unforgettable holiday in the Maldives.

dining.title: The Market
dining.description:
Indulge in our culinary haven, where your taste buds embark on a remarkable expedition of flavors from around the world. Our main restaurant is a splendid paradise for foodies. Step into our lively restaurant and immerse yourself in a world of culinary delights, offering a wide variety of vibrant food stations where you can select from an array of well-loved cuisines paying tribute to the diversity of flavors and cultures. Our menu is a symphony of taste sensations that will leave your taste buds singing with joy.
Join us at The Market for a culinary adventure like no other, where every bite is a journey to a new and exciting destination.
Opening Hours Breakfast: 07:30 to 10:00 | Lunch: 12:30 to 14:30 | Dinner: 19:30 to 21:30

dining.title: Il Basilico
dining.description:
Embark on a captivating voyage to the Italian Riviera, where every dish is a harmonious blend of flavors, tradition, and passion. Immerse yourself in the charming ambiance as you savor scrumptious wood-fired oven-baked pizzas that capture the essence of Italy. And, of course, don’t miss out on the divine Tiramisu, the ultimate finale of your culinary adventure.
Buon Appetito!
Opening Hours 11:00 – 23:00

dining.title: Palm Beach
dining.description:
Nestled at the island tip, Palm Beach, is a charming blend of restaurant and bar, perfect for relishing fascinating sunsets. Savor an exquisite Paella - the classic Spanish dish under sailed shades surrounded by palms, or drop in for a relaxed outdoor lunch. As the evening falls, this oasis metamorphoses into an enhancing escape, inviting you to relish freshly grilled barbeque under the velvety night sky.
Opening Hours Bar: 10:00 – 21:30 | Lunch: 12:30 – 14:30 | Snacks: 14:30 – 18:30
Afternoon Tea: 16:30- 17:30 | Dinner: 19:30 – 21:30

dining.title: Rainbow Bar
dining.description:
Shared happiness is the essence! Elevate your experience at Rainbow Bar with our meticulously crafted JOY drinks menu, perfect for sipping or quaffing. And, of course, don’t forget to indulge in our impressive selection of swanky wines.
Nestled beside the Rainbow Bar, our inviting swimming pool offers a refreshing escape. It is accessible for your leisure every day.
Opening Hours: 10:00 – 00:00

properties.name: You & Me Maldives
properties.description:
Love is in the Air
You & Me is a private, rustic and romantic island, in a beautiful, untouched corner of the Maldives. A world away from the stresses of everyday life, You & Me is the place to relax, curl up, and spend some quality ‘us time’.
You & Me is located in Raa Atoll, Northern Maldives, just 20 minutes by speed boat from Ifuru domestic airport, or a 45 minute, scenic seaplane ride from Male’ / Velana International Airport. Adults only island, targeting couples, honeymooners and friends, the resort is a quiet, relaxing retreat, far away from other hotels.
You & Me has 109 rooms and 99 of them are overwater, with unique rustic style never seen before in the Maldives. In all the rooms you will find handmade furnishings; made of natural wood with echoes to African traditions and fully equipped bathroom with luxury products and refined details.
You & Me introduces Dine Around concept whereby guests on Half Board, Full Board, and All-Inclusive packages can choose to eat lunch and dinner in any of the à la carte restaurants (except H2O underwater restaurant), and breakfast in the main restaurant.
properties.short_description: You & Me is a private, rustic and romantic island, in a beautiful, untouched corner of the Maldives. A world away from the stresses of everyday life, You & Me is the place to relax, curl up, and spend some quality ‘us time’.

properties.name: Hard Rock Hotel Maldives
properties.description:
Hard Rock Hotel Maldives is situated in Emboodhoo Lagoon, a 20-minute boat ride from Velana International Airport. It features 178 spacious rooms, including family suites, beach villas, and overwater villas. The hotel's design blends local culture with modern aesthetics and showcases music memorabilia. Guests enjoy unique amenities such as the Sound of Your Stay program with free Fender guitars and Crosley record players, a full-service Rock Spa®, a Rock Shop®, and clubs for kids and teens.
Dining options include a Pool Bar, all-day dining, a Pan-Latin restaurant, in-villa dining, and Hard Rock Cafe Maldives. The hotel provides direct access to The Marina @ CROSSROADS Maldives, offering entertainment, boutique shops, restaurants, bars, and various leisure activities.

properties.name: Conte Max
properties.description:
Join the M/Y Conte Max for a unique Maldivian liveaboard experience that combines wellness with diving. The yacht accommodates up to 17 guests (or 21 with triple occupancy) in 9 spacious cabins, each with climate control and en suite bathrooms. Enjoy amenities like a salon with TV, a bar with a wide drink selection, and diverse dining options. Relax on three decks featuring sun loungers and deck chairs.
The Conte Max offers year-round diving to the Maldives' best sites, with a dedicated diving dhoni and free nitrox for certified divers. Explore Central and Northern Atolls, or Southern and Extreme Southern Atolls, encountering sharks, turtles, and mantas. Book your adventure today!
The M/Y Conte Max, built in 2004 and renovated annually, measures 33 meters in length with a beam of 10 meters and cruises at a speed of 12 knots. Powered by Yanmar 405HP engines, The yacht features a dive dhoni for easy access to dive sites. It has a water capacity of 6 tons and a fuel capacity of 4,500 liters.

Welcome to Hotel Veli, your beachfront paradise on the pristine shores of Hulhumale. Here, the gentle embrace of ocean breezes meets our warm hospitality, creating an idyllic escape where you can truly unwind. With stunning vistas of the turquoise sea, Hotel Veli is your gateway to serenity and relaxation. Our inviting rooms and suites, including ocean view options, seamlessly combine modern comforts with a touch of cozy charm. At Veli, we are dedicated to crafting unforgettable experiences, ensuring your stay is as memorable as the breathtaking surroundings.

dining.title: The Catch 78
dining.description:
Catch 78 Veli is a vibrant dining spot located in Hulhumale, situated at H78. This restaurant offers a unique blend of local and international cuisine, making it a popular choice for both locals and visitors. The menu features a variety of fresh seafood, succulent meats, and flavorful vegetarian options, all crafted with high-quality ingredients.
The restaurant’s ambiance combines modern elegance with a relaxed atmosphere, perfect for casual meals or special occasions. Whether you’re looking to enjoy a leisurely lunch, a romantic dinner, or just a drink with friends, Catch 78 Veli provides a delightful dining experience with excellent service and a welcoming environment.

dining.title: Roof Top Dining
dining.description: Elevate your dining experience at H78 Veli's rooftop restaurant. With stunning panoramic views of Hulhumale, this sophisticated setting offers a memorable backdrop for any occasion. Enjoy a curated menu featuring a blend of local and international cuisine while taking in the breathtaking scenery. Perfect for romantic evenings, special celebrations, or casual get-togethers, the rooftop at H78 Veli combines exceptional food with an unforgettable ambiance.

properties.name: Maagiri Hotel
properties.description: Maagiri Hotel, perfectly positioned opposite Velana International Airport in Male’, offers an exceptional stay with its elegantly designed rooms, luxurious comforts, and breathtaking Maldivian sea views. The hotel features a Coffee Shop, Restaurant, Lounge, semi-fine dining, Meeting Rooms, and a fully equipped Gym. It caters to business travelers, leisure seekers, couples, and families, providing activities such as diving, fishing, and snorkeling. With its focus on delivering a memorable experience, Maagiri Hotel combines comfort and adventure to create an unforgettable stay.

accommodations.description:
Our six Executive Suites offer unparalleled luxury and comfort. Each suite is thoughtfully designed with distinct bedroom and living areas, allowing you to leave work and entertainment behind for an uninterrupted 8 hours of restful sleep.
Whether you’re staying for a few days or a week to explore the city after business meetings, the Executive Suite provides ample space for your belongings and more. Enjoy breathtaking scenic views and spacious comfort throughout your stay, all from the privacy of your suite.
6 Suites / Max 4 Adults / 50 SQM / Ocean View / King Size Bed (203cm X 203cm)

accommodations.title: Junior Suite
accommodations.description:
Situated in the eastern wing of the building, our Junior Suites offer a refreshing escape at Maagiri Hotel, surrounded by the serene blues of the ocean.
Relax and entertain guests in the dedicated lounging area while enjoying a selection of gourmet coffee. Immerse yourself in the tranquility of the suite, making each visit to Male' City a memorable experience.

accommodations.title: Premier Room
accommodations.description:

20 Rooms / Max 3 Adults / 22-24 SQM / City View / King Size Bed (203cm X 203cm)

dining.title: Coffee Curve
dining.description:
Coffee Curve, with its vibrant and jazz-inspired ambiance, is the ideal spot for a quick coffee break or a mid-day snack. Enjoy a selection of refreshing juices and iced teas, along with a lighter menu featuring sandwiches, burgers, wraps, pastries, and sweet treats designed to energize you.
From a rich espresso to a chilled café frappe, Coffee Curve guarantees top-notch service and the perfect coffee experience.

dining.title: Faru
dining.description:
Faru is the perfect destination for a diverse dining experience, offering semi-fine dining with stylish buffets, quick express meals, and à la carte options. Escape the tropical heat with refreshing juices and chilled mojitos while enjoying a meal that allows you to reconnect.
With its elegant décor and attentive service, Faru is ideal for a range of occasions, from family dinners and corporate lunches to intimate wedding celebrations.

dining.title: Peak
dining.description:
Peak offers a stunning terrace with panoramic ocean views, providing an exclusive yet relaxed atmosphere. Enjoy a menu of tantalizing dishes crafted with passion and served with warm, attentive service.
Ideal for social lunches or a charming evening escape, Peak transforms into a perfect spot to unwind with expertly crafted mocktails, savor sunset hues, and indulge in sharing platters or gourmet burgers. Amidst the city’s hustle and bustle, Peak is a favored gathering place for friends, families, and colleagues.

properties.name: Marselia Star
properties.description:
ABOUT THE YACHT
Marselia Star offers the perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and luxury. Dive into crystal-clear waters for snorkeling, unwind on pristine beaches, or enjoy a variety of on-board activities. Our expert crew is committed to fulfilling your every need, from gourmet dining and personalized service to a range of exclusive experiences. Whether you seek excitement or tranquility, Marselia Star delivers an unforgettable journey.
OUR CABIN
Our cabins are thoughtfully designed to offer the ideal blend of space, privacy, and elegance, ensuring a memorable and relaxing stay aboard. Enjoy a comfortable retreat that perfectly balances style and functionality for a truly exceptional experience.
properties.short_description: Marselia Star offers the perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and luxury. Dive into crystal-clear waters for snorkeling, unwind on pristine beaches, or enjoy a variety of on-board activities. Our expert crew is committed to fulfilling your every need, from gourmet dining and personalized service to a range of exclusive experiences. Whether you seek excitement or tranquility, Marselia Star delivers an unforgettable journey.

accommodations.title: Upper Deck Cabbins
accommodations.description:
Our spacious cabins feature a luxurious king-size bed with plush bedding for a restful night's sleep. Greet each morning with stunning views of the Maldives through expansive windows.
Each cabin is thoughtfully equipped with modern amenities, including a safe, air-conditioning, minibar, and Wi-Fi, ensuring a comfortable and enjoyable stay.
The master suite bathroom boasts a spacious Jacuzzi tub, ideal for relaxing after a day of exploring the Maldives. It also includes a vanity, shower, and lavatory, along with plush towels to enhance your comfort.

accommodations.title: Lower Deck Cabbins
accommodations.description: Our standard cabins, while cozier than the Master Suite cabins, still offer comfortable accommodations for guests. These cabins feature either twin beds or a double bed, and include a shower and lavatory. Modern amenities such as air conditioning, a safe, minibar, towels, and ample storage are provided. Some standard cabins also feature a small sitting area and a porthole or window, allowing natural light and views of the surrounding waters.

dining.title: The finest culinary delights and drinks
dining.description:
Our chef, Rajesh, an expert Indian national, masterfully combines the vibrant flavors of this tropical island paradise with traditional European and Mediterranean cuisine. Each day, you’ll enjoy three buffet-style meals, complemented by a curated selection of global wines and Champagnes.
Indulge in a variety of culinary delights including the freshest seafood, premium lamb and beef, Asian specialties, and unique creations from the chef. Fresh, cooked-to-order lobster is available for a small fee.
Dining aboard our yacht offers a truly unforgettable experience: savor breakfast as you watch the sunrise, enjoy a leisurely lunch in the sun, and relish a memorable dinner under the stars. All meals and dining times are customized to fit your group’s preferences.

dining.title: Bar
dining.description:
Our bar, expertly managed by experienced staff and attentive waiters, is situated on the upper deck, offering a scenic view of the stern and direct access to the shaded lounge deck. This versatile space is perfect for lively parties or relaxing sheesha and drink sessions, enhanced by music and DJ lights.
Enjoy a diverse selection of fine wines and Champagnes, or indulge in exotic cocktails crafted by our skilled bartenders. We also offer a wide range of branded beers, spirits, cordials, and liquors to suit every taste.

dining.title: BBQ
dining.description:
On all routes, our onboard guest relations manager arranges a unique BBQ experience on a pristine, uninhabited island or a specially selected island for your convenience. These BBQs are thoughtfully designed with nature in mind, using only reusable or natural items.
Mix with fellow guests while sipping cocktails on a stunning sandy beach, with azure waters lapping at the shore and the day’s fresh catch sizzling on the grill.
Savor delicious food, great company, and the enchanting magic of the Maldives under a starlit sky.

properties.name: Kaani Beach Hotel
properties.description:
Located on the vibrant Maafushi Island, Kaani Beach Hotel offers a serene beach escape surrounded by coconut palms. The hotel features sea view rooms with private balconies, all equipped with modern amenities including air conditioning, hot water showers, satellite TV, free Wi-Fi, mini bar, hair dryer, and a safe.
Guests can enjoy a delicious buffet breakfast and dinner at the hotel's restaurant, relax on the rooftop terrace with loungers, and take part in a variety of entertainment, including karaoke.
For adventure seekers, the hotel offers a wide range of budget-friendly activities typically found in luxury resorts, such as fishing trips, snorkeling, visits to sandbanks, dolphin watching, and water sports. A floating bar is available just two minutes away with complimentary transfers.
Maafushi Island is conveniently located 25 km south of Male International Airport, reachable in 30 minutes by speedboat or 90 minutes by regular ferry.

properties.name: Kaani Grand Seaview | Maafushi | Maldives
properties.description:
Located in South Male Atoll, just 25 km from Male City, Kaani Grand Seaview offers beachfront luxury with a spa, fitness center, and conference facilities.
Each ocean view room features a private balcony, air conditioning, a personal safe, minibar, flat-screen TV with cable channels, and complimentary coffee/tea making facilities. Free toiletries and a hairdryer are also provided.
The hotel is directly opposite Bikini Beach, with an in-house restaurant serving both local and Western cuisine, paired with stunning lagoon views.
Guests can take advantage of the 24-hour front desk, which offers airport transfers, luggage storage, and tour arrangements at the onsite excursion center. Popular activities in the area include snorkeling, diving, and cycling, with bicycle rentals available.
The nearest airport is Male International Airport, located 25 km away.

properties.name: Kiha Beach
properties.description:
Kiha Beach is a boutique luxury hotel on a charming local island, offering the ultimate 'island life' experience. With its prime location, top-notch amenities, and warm hospitality, your stay promises to be unforgettable. Immerse yourself in the stunning natural surroundings, vibrant sea life, and unique fauna of this Biosphere Reserve, creating memories you'll cherish for a lifetime.
Summary:
• Boutique luxury hotel on a local island
• Prime location with beautiful natural surroundings
• Luxury amenities and exceptional service
• Experience rich biodiversity in a Biosphere Reserve
Nearby Attractions:
Restaurants & cafes
• Cafe/barRaaveriya bar 4.1 km
• RestaurantBenjarong 8 km
• Cafe/barSand Bar 8 km
Beaches in the Neighbourhood:
• Dharavandhoo Beach: 3 m
• Bikini Beach: 6 km
• Horubadhoo Island Beach: 8 km*
Closest Airports:
• Dharavandhoo Airport: 500 m
• Madivaru Airport: 41 km*
• Ifuru Airport: 61 km*
*Distances are measured in a straight line. Actual travel distance may vary.
• Sea Sports Adventures
Experience a range of seasonal sea sports, from windsurfing to canoeing. Set sail around the island on a catamaran or amp up the excitement with a thrilling jet ski ride. Contact us for more details and to plan your adventure!
• Fishing Experience
Embrace the island life with a fishing adventure! Bring your own gear or hire a rod from us to enjoy a relaxing day on the water. Perfect for both beginners and seasoned anglers.
Sandbanks & Excursions
• Maalhos Island
Discover the charm of Maalhos Island, known for its unique sea almonds. Experience the local tradition where islanders gather these nuts during special ceremonies, promoting conservation and the preservation of Maldivian cuisine.
• Sandbank Getaways
Immerse yourself in the tranquil beauty of our nearby sandbanks. Enjoy the serenity of nature, spot white terns and frigatebirds, and savor a private picnic organized just for you. This is the perfect way to disconnect from the world and create unforgettable memories with your loved ones.
• Snorkeling Adventures
Experience the breathtaking marine life of Baa Atoll without the need for scuba gear! Our warm, crystal-clear waters offer high visibility, making Snorkeling an enjoyable and therapeutic experience.
• House Reef
Swim at your leisure to our house reef and discover the vibrant underwater world in true 'island life' style.
• Kihaadhoo Reef
Explore this nearby island's waters, home to over 200 species of reef-associated fish. You're sure to meet a captivating new friend beneath the waves!
• Hanifaru Bay
Dive into the wonders of this UNESCO-protected area, where you can witness the spectacular gathering of manta rays during feeding season. This unique site is also a breeding ground for gentle whale sharks and a nesting habitat for green and hawksbill turtles. Join us for an unforgettable Snorkeling experience!
Afternoon Tea Experience
• Discover the unique Maldivian twist on the traditional British afternoon tea during your stay with us. Indulge in handcrafted savory and sweet delights, known as 'short eats,' made from local ingredients such as fresh coconut, rice flour, palm sugar, smoked tuna, and spices.
• This cultural tradition is a cherished family and social time, often enjoyed with friends and neighbours. On special occasions, afternoon tea receptions bring communities together, reflecting the warm Maldivian spirit.
• Join us for a delightful afternoon on your balcony, sipping tea while savoring a variety of flavors from our short eats. Let the gentle sea breeze and late afternoon sun enhance your culinary journey through the Maldives!

articles.title: Explore Maldives
articles.body:
The Maldives is the smallest country in Asia. Including the sea, the territory spans roughly 90,000 square kilometres (35,000 sq mi), with a land area of 298 square kilometres (115 sq mi).
The Maldives is one of the world's most geographically dispersed sovereign states, and the smallest Muslim-majority country by land area. With a population of 515,132 in the 2022 census, it is the 2nd least populous country in Asia and the ninth-smallest country in the world by area.
Malé is the capital and the most populated city, traditionally called the "King's Island", where the ancient royal dynasties ruled from its central location.
The Maldivian Archipelago is located on the Chagos–Laccadive Ridge, a vast submarine mountain range in the Indian Ocean; this also forms a terrestrial ecoregion with the Chagos Archipelago and Lakshadweep.
The Maldives has an average ground-level elevation of 1.5 metres (4 ft 11 in) above sea level, and a highest natural point of only 2.4 metres (7 ft 10 in), making it the world's lowest-lying country.
source : wikipedia

articles.title: Planning your Trip
articles.body: Before you plan your trip to the Maldives, please consider the following information to get around the Maldives easy and make the best out of your trip.

articles.title: Surfing Spots
articles.body: Experience the thrill of surfing in the Maldives, where crystal-clear waters and world-class waves meet stunning tropical beauty. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned pro, the Maldives offers perfect surf conditions, with warm waters and consistent swells throughout the year. Explore the best breaks across the islands and immerse yourself in the ultimate surfing adventure.

articles.title: Shipwreck
articles.body: The Maldives is renowned for its pristine waters and incredible marine biodiversity, and the Underwater Treasures of the Maldives are best experienced through its shipwrecks. These submerged relics form artificial reefs, teeming with vibrant marine life and attracting divers from across the globe. The shipwrecks provide a haven for colorful corals, schools of fish, and larger species like sharks and rays. Each dive unveils a story of history, mystery, and natural beauty, making it a must-visit destination for both adventurers and marine enthusiasts.

articles.title: Diving Spots
articles.body:
A Diver’s Paradise
The Maldives is synonymous with stunning beaches, but what lies beneath its turquoise waters is equally captivating. With over 1,200 islands scattered across 26 atolls, the Maldives offers some of the world’s most extraordinary diving experiences. It’s warm, crystal-clear waters host vibrant coral reefs and diverse marine life, making it a top destination for divers from around the globe.
Why Dive in the Maldives?
• Unparalleled Biodiversity: The Maldives is home to over 2,000 species of fish and hundreds of coral species. You can spot manta rays, whale sharks, turtles, reef sharks, and tropical fish in the same dive.
• Pristine Waters: With underwater visibility often exceeding 30 meters, it’s like swimming through an aquarium.
• Year-Round Diving: Thanks to the warm climate, diving in the Maldives is possible throughout the year. The two monsoon seasons affect water conditions, with the best diving experiences from November to May.
• Unique Dive Types: The Maldives offers a variety of dive experiences, from drift diving in strong currents, which attract large pelagic species, to night diving, which reveals a whole new side of marine life.
